case_title: CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. GISELLE L. BARRY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.92) SERVED NOV-03-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARRY, GISELLE L.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $955.00 FILED BY CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BARRY, GISELLE L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRY, GISELLE L. $905.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $955.92, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
